tick_delta_vs_1330.summary: Second consecutive zero-delta tick. Strategy layer silent for 76 minutes (since BANDHANBNK BUY at 12:44:19). Cash, holdings, sector mix, deployment, P&L all identical to the 13:00 and 13:30 snapshots.

findings: Zero-delta tick (#2 in a row): no fills, no new submissions, no SELLs in the 13:30→14:00 window. Strategy silence now 1h16m post-BANDHANBNK BUY.
Cash buffer healthy at 50.55% of capital (₹503,275). Filled deployment 49.45% / full-fill projection 59.30% — comfortable 5.70 pp buffer to 65% cap.
No single-name concentration breach: largest filled position NESTLEIND at 12.06% of capital, 2.94 pp buffer to 15% max_position_pct cap.
No sector concentration breach: largest sector BFSI 12.93% on full fill (PNBHOUSING+BANDHANBNK), 9.07 pp buffer to 22% max_sector_pct cap. All 6 sectors comfortably under cap.
Daily realized P&L = ₹0 (2 BUYs today, both still OPEN; 0 SELLs). No risk of daily_loss_limit_pct circuit breaker firing.

GLENMARK OPEN order is now 4h49m old (submitted 09:10:58 at ₹2400 limit) — observability flag continues. No risk_monitor lever (cancellation/MODIFY is a strategy-layer call), but ageing is monotonically extending across each tick. If still OPEN at EOD, log into the EOD review as a stale-order observation.

FLAG (carried from 13:00 and 13:30, unchanged): Both today's SL widths (GLENMARK 4.4%, BANDHANBNK 4.5%) sit at/just past the 4% max_sl_pct ceiling. Per-name worst-case risk ~0.22% of capital each, within 0.5% per-name budget. Cumulative book P&L -0.44% (₹-4,407.36) reflects Day-6 panic-exit damage. Book continues to heal via cash redeployment, not realization.

Tighten max_deployed_pct (0.65 → 0.60): NOT FIRED. Full-fill projection 59.30%, 5.70 pp buffer; 13:30 pre-fire trigger spec ('full-fill > 62%') has not fired — projection is flat tick-over-tick.

Tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12): NOT FIRED. NESTLEIND 12.06% largest, 2.94 pp buffer; no holdings movement.

Tighten max_sl_pct (0.04 → 0.035): NOT FIRED. The 13:00/13:30 trigger ('3rd ceiling-hugging entry this session → fire') did not fire — no entries at all in the 13:30→14:00 window. Lever remains ARMED for the rest of the session.

Note on discipline: firing any lever on a second consecutive zero-delta tick would be decorative tightening — there is no failure mode active and no behavioral signal to dampen. The override stack is already biting (today's 2 BUYs cleared a 0.65 floor and SL-ceiling guardrail; deployment is held below cap). Holding fire is the correct action.

max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.60 — fires if full-fill projection climbs above 62% (currently 59.30%, 2.70 pp pre-fire buffer).
max_sector_pct 0.22 → 0.20 — fires if any sector full-fill exposure exceeds 17% (largest currently BFSI 12.93%, 4.07 pp pre-fire buffer).
daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04 → 0.03 — fires if daily realized P&L worsens past -₹15K (currently ₹0).

rationale: Second consecutive pure zero-delta tick. Same 8 holdings, same 2 OPEN orders, same ₹503K cash, same ₹0 daily P&L, same -0.44% cumulative. The Day-1→Day-6 override stack (min_confidence 0.65, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.65, max_sector_pct 0.22, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04, daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04) is doing its work and the book carries no active risk vector. Risk_monitor's discipline at 14:00 is to NOT fire decoratively when no trigger has fired — every prior override was earned by a clean trigger, and this tick's restraint preserves that pattern. Levers re-armed for the rest of the session as listed. No changelog entry written because no parameter was changed.
